parents.subject: LU-16724 ptlrpc: rename ppp_index to ppp_order

commit.subject: LU-16724 ptlrpc: rename INDEX macros
commit.message:
LU-16724 ptlrpc: rename INDEX macros

Rename INDEX macros to ORDER.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ic1123d25bc855dc7671c9cb587a0d6680662b729
